abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model ignores severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Surveyor's Tools
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (melee)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Mass Hysteria
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 3".

triggers.name: Collateral Damage
triggers.text: Remove a marker or destructible terrain within 2" of the target.

actions.name: Hooked Chain
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Chain Gang
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another friendly model only. Once per turn.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3". Then, this model may move up to 3", which must end within 3" of the target.

actions.name: Field of Steel
actions.effects: This model gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: Pulverize
triggers.text: Remove all enemy markers and destructible terrain within (melee)2" of this model.
